title: LOUISIANA REAL ESTATE LICENSE LAW
doc_html:
CHAPTER 17.  LOUISIANA REAL ESTATE LICENSE LAW

§1430.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Louisiana Real Estate License Law."

Added by Acts 1983, No. 268, §1.
